assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 16: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — identical to claude-md-configured.md line 16.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 17: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — new row with serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-25 contain identical Jira fields: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747 — all matching claude-md-configured.md.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md uses explicit PRESERVED and ADDED labels: line 13 '| PRESERVED | Row: trustify-backend / ...' and line 14 '| ADDED | Row: trustify-ui / ...'. Jira fields (lines 20-24) all marked PRESERVED. Code Intelligence items (lines 33-35) marked PRESERVED/ADDED.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 11: '| serena_backend | ... | Already in Registry |' and line 12: '| serena_ui | ... | NEW — not in Registry |'. Also line 49: 'Existing section covers serena_backend. New instance serena_ui needs to be added to Limitations subsection.'

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 28-42 are identical to claude-md-configured.md lines 28-41, preserving the naming convention ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name'), the serena_backend find_symbol example (lines 33-37), and the serena_backend limitation (line 42). The only addition is line 43: '- `serena_ui`: No known limitations'.
